root.sql: SELECT vr_nsk_010_010000.monthly_date, vr_nsk_010_010000.member_status_code, vr_nsk_010_010000.member_status_name, vr_nsk_010_010000.mem_type_code, vr_nsk_010_010000.mem_type_desc, vr_nsk_010_010000.deposit_type_code, vr_nsk_010_010000.deposit_name, vr_nsk_010_010000.count_dep, vr_nsk_010_010000.deposit_balance, vr_nsk_010_010000.int_arrear FROM vr_nsk_010_010000 where 1=1 and vr_nsk_010_010000.monthly_date = '!monthly_date_1!' /*WHERE*/
